question: Top 10 Test run scorers of all time
query: Top 10 Test run scorers of all time
sql: SELECT p.name, SUM(d.runs_batter) AS total_runs FROM deliveries d JOIN players p ON d.batter = p.name GROUP BY p.name ORDER BY total_runs DESC LIMIT 10
explanation: The list of top Test run scorers of all time is led by Joe Root with an impressive 13,943 runs, followed by Alastair Cook with 12,472 runs. Other notable players include Steve Smith and Kane Williamson, showcasing their remarkable consistency and skill in the longest format of the game.
answer: The list of top Test run scorers of all time is led by Joe Root with an impressive 13,943 runs, followed by Alastair Cook with 12,472 runs. Other notable players include Steve Smith and Kane Williamson, showcasing their remarkable consistency and skill in the longest format of the game.
